name: TB Automotive
notes: CMS: Duda CMS identified via window.Parameters.SiteAlias='9589cae8', dmAPI globals, and lirp.cdn-website.com asset CDN. Feed discovery: no RSS/Atom/JSON Feed links found, /feed and /feed.xml return 404. No structured JSON:API, GraphQL, or OpenAPI endpoints found. No __NEXT_DATA__ or SPA framework hydration payloads. Embedded JSON-LD: schema.org AutoDealer markup only, no Vehicle listings. Inventory is presented as plain-text list items in Duda gallery widget — each entry in format 'YEAR MAKE MODEL - $PRICE'. 7 listings total extracted via HTML text parsing after stripping scripts/styles. Mileage not listed anywhere on the page. Note: inventory includes non-automobile items (powersports, boat trailer, moped). | Non-automobile items (boat, motorcycle, ATV, moped) removed in post-processing: 4 dropped.

titleAudit.note: All 3 automobile listings on the /vehicle-sales Duda page sampled; none mentioned title status. Listing descriptions use 'Runs and Drives Great' and 'Super Clean' language but no title claims. No sitewide title disclosure found.
